full_text:
Deng Long 鄧龍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Long (鄧龍). Attempted to attack Zhou Yu at Chaisang, Deng Long was defeated and captured. Deng Long was affiliated with Liu Biao.
